---
title: "Prunus"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

## Planting summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Almond](/trees/species/almond.html) | 0 | — |
| [Bird Cherry](/trees/species/bird-cherry.html) | 1 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Sour Cherry](/trees/species/sour-cherry.html) | 0 | — |
| [Sweet Cherry](/trees/species/sweet-cherry.html) | 0 | — |
